rationale.R1.3: The revised text maintains the original claims and evidence linkage without introducing any new claims or altering existing ones.
rationale.RX.1: The revisions are minor and do not change the confidence level of the claims presented in the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, as all changes were explicitly justified by the notes provided.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors or harmful content introduced; only minor wording adjustments that do not affect the meaning or implications of the claims.
rationale.RX.5: The revisions trace back to specific edits made based on the provided rationale, ensuring provenance and traceability.
